hero.title: SaloneHub

welcomePrompt: What do you want to do today — ask the AI, browse services, or find officials?
chatSuggestion1: "How do I apply for a passport?"
chatSuggestion2: "What are the fees for business registration?"
chatSuggestion3: "Where can I get a driver's license in Bo?"
